cron.name: hydration-reminder-morning
cron.prompt: Check hydration status for today. If the user hasn't met their water goal, send a gentle reminder.

cron.name: hydration-reminder-afternoon
cron.prompt: Check hydration status. Send reminder if behind target.

cron.name: diet-lunch-reminder
cron.prompt: Check if the user has logged lunch. If not, gently ask if they'd like to record it.

cron.name: diet-dinner-reminder
cron.prompt: Check if the user has logged dinner. If not, gently ask if they'd like to record it.

cron.name: training-evening-check
cron.prompt: Check if the user had a training task today. If it's not completed, give a low-friction starting suggestion.

cron.name: weekly-checkin
cron.prompt: Weekly check-in time. Review the past week's data and prompt for weight/measurements update.
